unmet_need: Personalized music exploration beyond current tastes
segment: Music enthusiasts seeking discovery and growth
example_quotes: When Discover Weekly actually nails it, it's pure magic and honestly the reason I pay for premium.
Discover Weekly has gone stale and repetitive. I never discover anything genuinely new from it anymore.
My discover weekly is stale. Every week it's the same vibe and the same handful of artists. I'm bored of it.

unmet_need: A feature to help users retain and revisit discovered music, turning it into a habit
segment: Casual music enthusiasts with high intent but low retention
example_quotes: New music never sticks. I play something once and it's gone — it never enters my long-term rotation.
why do i save 10 songs off release radar and then never listen to them again. nothing ever sticks lol
High intent here — I open Discover Weekly, save a couple, then forget them. Nothing ever converts into a habit.

unmet_need: Personalized music exploration that balances comfort and discovery
example_quotes: give me a dial for how adventurous my recs are. some days i want comfort, some days i want a real stretch
Good app but discovery recommends stuff so safe and cautious it's boring. I never find anything genuinely new.
A comfort-to-curiosity dial is genius. The biggest gap in every recommender is control over how far the recs stretch.

unmet_need: Contextual and personalized music discovery that explains why a song was recommended
segment: Casual and engaged music listeners seeking effortless and trustworthy music discovery
example_quotes: Recommendations arrive with no context. Just tell me why this track fits my taste so I can trust it.
the recs never tell me WHY a song was picked. i don't trust a recommendation that comes with no reason
Recommendations never explain why a track was picked. I don't trust a suggestion that comes with no reason.

unmet_need: Personalized, low-effort music recommendations that fit existing tastes
example_quotes: as a busy parent i have zero time to crate dig. i just want good new music to come to me with no effort
Two kids, zero energy after work to look for music. I just fall back on the same comfort playlist on repeat.
Busy parents need zero-effort discovery that respects their time and comes to them instead of making them dig.

unmet_need: novel and relevant music recommendations that break the user out of their current listening routine
example_quotes: Stuck on repeat with the same comfort songs. The app never gently nudges me to expand my rotation.
stuck in a rut listening to the same songs on repeat and the algorithm refuses to break me out of the loop
Stuck-in-a-loop is so real. People fall back on the same songs on repeat; the product that breaks that rut wins.

unmet_need: Access to obscure and deep-cut music recommendations
example_quotes: Power digger here. I want deep cuts and obscure artists below a certain popularity, but the algorithm plays it way too safe.
Power user here, I want obscure deep cuts and the algorithm refuses to go below a certain popularity threshold. Discovery for nerds is broken.
I'm a power user who digs deep cuts and obscure artists below a certain popularity. Spotify's recommendations and discovery are far too cautious and safe for me.

unmet_need: A gradual and structured approach to exploring new music genres
example_quotes: trying to get into jazz but i keep bouncing off it. i need a guided on-ramp not a 5 hour playlist someone help
Guided genre missions — get into jazz over 3 weeks with a staged on-ramp — would be a game changer for beginners.
I keep trying to get into jazz but bounce off it every time. I need a guided on-ramp that eases me in week by week.
